context_for_next_testing_agent: Import features (Feature 1 - Referee Schedule Import and Feature 2 - Manager Bulk Game Import) are fully implemented and tested. Both features support CSV file uploads with proper parsing, preview, and Firestore batch writes. The referee import correctly separates past games (to independent_games) from future dates (to referee_availability). The manager import supports both existing tournament selection and creating new tournaments during import. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for automated testing.
